name: pskoett-ai-skills
description: Two-loop skill pipeline for Codex. Inner loop skills catch failures in-session; outer loop skills turn recurring gaps into durable rules and evals.

interface.longDescription: Bundle reusable Codex skills for planning, execution, verification, hardening, and cross-session learning.
defaultPrompt: Use pskoett-ai-skills to run a plan interview before this refactor.
Use pskoett-ai-skills to verify, simplify, and harden this change.
Use pskoett-ai-skills to capture this failure as a learning and eval.
